data.title: Pepe might hit Wall Street like Dogecoin, but ETFs show minimal interest amidst meme hype frenzy. CoinShares' Butterfill notes lukewarm Dogecoin inflows.
data.description: James Butterfill from CoinShares reported that there has been lukewarm interest in Dogecoin funds, with Pepe ETF application now available.

data.title: KBRA Assigns AAA Rating to Various San Diego Unified School Districts GO Bonds; Affirms Rating for Outstanding GO Bonds
data.description: KBRA has awarded a top-notch AAA long-term rating to the San Diego Unified School District for their 2026 General Obligation Refunding Bonds. This includes the following series: Election of 1998, Series R-9; Election of 2008, Series SR-6A; and Election of 2008, Series SR-6B. This rating reflects the district's strong ability to meet its financial commitments, indicating a low credit risk for investors. It demonstrates the district's stable financial outlook and solid management, providing assurance to investors and stakeholders.

data.title: M-tron Industries, Inc. Announces Extension of Previously Announced Rights Offering
data.description: In Orlando, Florida, on April 9, 2026, M-tron Industries, Inc. extended the expiration of its rights offering to buy shares of the company's common stock valued at $0.01 per share. The company, listed on NYSE American under the ticker symbols MPTI and MPTI RT, made the announcement.

data.title: LSI Industries Announces Fiscal 2026 Third Quarter Results Conference Call Date
data.description: Cincinnati-based LSI Industries, Inc. (Nasdaq: LYTS) disclosed plans to release its fiscal 2026 third quarter results on Thursday, April 23, 2026, before the market opens. The leading U.S. manufacturer of commercial lighting and display solutions is scheduled to host a conference call at 11:00 a.m. ET on the same day to delve into the financial results, address recent developments, and engage in a live question-and-answer session. The call will also be webcasted.

data.title: Nordea Bank Abp: Repurchase of own shares on 09.04.2026
data.description: On April 9, 2026, Nordea Bank Abp announced a stock exchange release regarding changes in the company's own shares. As of 22:30 EET on the same day, Nordea Bank Abp (LEI: 529900ODI3047E2LIV03) disclosed the completion of repurchases of its own shares with ISIN FI4000297767. The specific details of the trading venue and other relevant information were provided in the release.

data.title: Strata Critical Medical to Present at the 25th Annual Needham Virtual Healthcare Conference
data.description: Strata Critical Medical, Inc. (Nasdaq: SRTA) disclosed plans to participate in the 25th Annual Needham Virtual Healthcare Conference on April 15, 2026, at 1:30 pm ET. The management of Strata will be presenting at the event, and a webcast can be accessed through the provided link. Following the presentation, a replay will be accessible on the investor relations portion of the Company’s website at https://ir.stratacritical.com/.

data.title: Cavvy Energy's annual shareholders meeting and Q1 2026 results to be discussed in conference call and webcast.
data.description: A recent study reveals that approximately 25% of adults in the United States have reported experiencing chronic pain lasting for more than 3 months. This amounts to around 50 million adults in the country. The study also found that about 8% of adults have high-impact chronic pain, greatly affecting their daily lives and activities. Some common types of chronic pain reported include lower back pain, severe headache or migraine, and neck pain. These findings underscore the significant impact of chronic pain on a large segment of the population in the U.S.

data.description: In the latest update, it has been reported that the number of confirmed cases of COVID-19 has reached over 3.5 million worldwide, with the death toll surpassing 250,000. Furthermore, approximately 1.2 million individuals have recovered from the virus globally. The United States remains the most affected country with over 1.2 million cases and more than 70,000 deaths. Other severely impacted nations include Spain, Italy, and the United Kingdom. Governments worldwide continue to implement strict measures to control the spread of the virus and protect public health.

data.title: Circle stock falls 10% after analyst downgrade and Drift Protocol investigation, fueling worries about USDC exposure, crypto regulations, and market volatility.
data.description: The company behind a stablecoin is under scrutiny following a stock downgrade and fallout from an exploit in the Drift Protocol, leading to apprehension regarding its exposure to USDC, regulation in the cryptocurrency space, and risks in the market.

data.title: Xanadu Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results
data.description: In the beginning of 2026, Xanadu, a tech company, went public and as a result, it started the year with enhanced financial resources. This will enable them to progress with their multi-year technology plan which focuses on improving fault tolerance, expanding manufacturing operations, and increasing commercial usage.

data.title: South Bow Announces Timing of First-quarter 2026 Results, Conference Call and Webcast, and Annual General Meeting
data.description: South Bow Corp, a company listed on both TSX and NYSE under the ticker symbol SOBO, announced that it will disclose its financial and operational performance for the first quarter of 2026 on May 7, 2026, after the market's closure. The report will include key figures and data regarding the company's performance during the initial months of the year.
